connect.title: Mealie Go
connect.subtitle: Connect to your Mealie server
connect.proxyHint: For servers behind Cloudflare Access, Authelia, or an API-key reverse proxy — these headers are sent with every request, including sign-in.
connect.oidcRequiredHint: This server requires SSO sign-in — use the button above.
connect.oldVersionWarning: This server is running Mealie {{version}}, which is older than this app fully supports (v2.0.0+) — some features may not work correctly.
connect.rememberedHint: Your username and password are encrypted and saved on this device so you don't have to re-enter them.
connect.notRememberedHint: This account won't be saved — you'll need to re-enter your credentials next time.
connect.missingFieldsMsg: Please fill in all three fields.
connect.invalidUrlMsg: Server URL must start with http:// or https://
connect.apiTokenToggle: Sign in with an API token instead?
connect.apiTokenHint: For SSO-only servers: in Mealie's web interface, open your user profile → API Tokens, create a token, and paste it here.

oidc.title: Log in with {{provider}}
oidc.notSignedInMsg: Finish signing in above, then tap "I've signed in — Continue" again.
